name: Mary J. Blige
abstract: Mary Jane Blige ( BLYZHE; born January 11, 1971) is an American singer, songwriter, actress, and entrepreneur. Often referred to by the honorifics "Queen of Hip-Hop Soul" and "Queen of R&B", her accolades include nine Grammy Awards, a Primetime Emmy Award, four American Music Awards, twelve NAACP Image Awards, and twelve Billboard Music …

about_quotes.speaker: Robert Glasper
about_quotes.evidence: So after a while it was like I had to make a decision, to be here or not. So I said I had to leave. It’s now become cool for your music director to be gone, because the pastor can say, “our music director is out with Mary J. Blige this Sunday.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Robert Glasper interviewed by Greg Thomas, Clinton, New York, February 20, 2016
